title: Ultra Hard Difficulty
description: This mod just makes the game very Hard
body:
This is a Mod that aims to make Minecraft way Harder for the People that think the game is too easy and want a real challange.

The Goal is to beat the Enderdragon to beat this mod but you can always play more if you are sane enough.

Some features of this mod are:

- Blocks drops are Modified
- Jumping is not a good idea
- traveling to the Nether and End has some nice Surprieses :)
- and if you want to speedrun the mod i included a Timer

If you somehow beat the mod and killed the Enderdragon pls feel free to make a Video and upload it to Youtube and send the link in the comments.

I will put your Video on the Leaderboard (the better time the Higher your place):
